Add {key} to your repository secrets:

error.pathHint: Check the file path and try again.

context.title: Diff Context
review.setup.continueHint: Press Enter to continue, Esc to go back

review.setup.escBack: Press Esc or 'b' to go back
review.setup.navHint: Up/Down to select, Space to toggle, Enter to continue, b to go back
review.setup.startHint: Press Enter to start, b/Esc to go back

model.selector.tip: Tip: type "groq/" to filter by provider
model.selector.noMatch: No models match. Try a different search or check model-rankings.json.
model.selector.hints: {check}=key set  {cross}=no key  |  ↑↓ scroll  Enter select  Type to search  Esc cancel
help.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
cli.review.noInput: No diff input. Pipe a diff or provide a file path.
cli.config.notFound: Config not found. Run '{cmd} init' first.
cli.init.noKeys: No API keys found. Groq offers a free tier — get started at https://console.groq.com
cli.error.apiKey: API key not set for provider: {provider}
cli.status.title: CodeAgora Status
cli.providers.test.title: Provider Status
cli.staged.empty: No staged changes. Stage files with 'git add' first.
cli.error.gitStagedFailed: Failed to run 'git diff --staged'. Are you in a git repository?
cli.error.prFormat: --pr must be a GitHub PR URL or a number
cli.error.diffPathRequired: diff-path required (or pipe via stdin, or use --pr)
cli.info.cacheHit: Cache hit — returning previous review result. Use --no-cache for a fresh review.
cli.error.runInitFirst: Config file not found. Run "{cmd} init" first.
cli.error.yamlNotSupported: YAML config editing is not yet supported. Use .ca/config.json.
cli.error.sessionIdFormat: Session ID must be in YYYY-MM-DD/NNN format
cli.error.invalidSessionIdFormat: Invalid session ID format. Expected: YYYY-MM-DD/NNN
desktop.repo.fact.head: Head
desktop.sessions.filterPlaceholder: Filter verdicts, files, or session ids
desktop.sessions.emptyTitle: No reviews have landed here yet.
desktop.sessions.emptyBody: Run a staged or working-tree review to create the first local evidence bundle.
desktop.sessions.noFilterMatch: No sessions match the current filter.
desktop.cockpit.readyTitle: Ready to create the first verdict
desktop.cockpit.readyBody: CodeAgora will collect model findings, debate evidence, and final verdicts into local sessions.
desktop.detail.emptyTitle: Select a session to inspect the verdict.
desktop.detail.emptyBody: The detail view highlights the final decision, blocker severity, debate artifacts, and exportable evidence.
desktop.detail.noFindings: No findings recorded. This session is ready to archive or share.
desktop.run.title: Create a review evidence bundle
desktop.run.body: Choose the safest diff scope, watch CLI progress, and let the desktop app refresh sessions when the run completes.
desktop.run.stagedBody: Only review what you intentionally staged for the next commit.
desktop.run.workingBody: Review all local edits, including unstaged changes.
desktop.run.noActiveBody: Start a review above to see CLI milestones, session creation, and final status here.
desktop.command.title: Tauri Command Boundary
desktop.command.notLoaded: Command contract is not loaded yet.
desktop.config.body: Tune reviewers and providers with validation before saving. Advanced JSON remains available for exact config control.
desktop.config.notValidated: Config has not been validated yet.
desktop.setup.title: Connect review providers and automation surfaces
desktop.setup.body: Missing API providers are optional until you select them in config. Local CLI backends, MCP, Actions, and release evidence stay independently visible.
desktop.setup.providerStatusNotLoaded: Provider status has not been loaded yet.
desktop.setup.providerStatusHint: Refresh setup to detect configured API keys and local CLI tools.
desktop.setup.mcpNotLoaded: MCP status has not been loaded yet.
desktop.setup.githubActionNotLoaded: GitHub Action status has not been loaded yet.
desktop.setup.workflowSummary: {codeagora} CodeAgora workflow(s) found across {workflows} workflow file(s).
desktop.setup.evidenceNotLoaded: Evidence status has not been loaded yet.
desktop.readiness.readyBody: Workspace trust, git context, and current config are ready for a private-preview run.
desktop.readiness.blockedBody: Resolve these items first, then launch staged or working-tree review from this screen.
desktop.readiness.reason.notGitRepo: Selected path is not a git repository.
desktop.readiness.reason.configMissing: CodeAgora config file was not found in this workspace.
desktop.readiness.reason.configInvalid: Current config validation is failing. Fix config before launch.
desktop.degraded.title: Degraded run signal
desktop.degraded.runBody: Some run events indicate degraded execution. Review timeline details and session evidence before acting.
desktop.degraded.sessionBody: This session includes degraded execution signals. Treat findings as partial evidence and rerun after fixes if needed.
desktop.detail.exportGuidance: Export this verdict bundle for PR context, teammate handoff, or release evidence tracking.
desktop.next.title: What to do next
desktop.next.fixBlockers: Fix the blocking findings first in your branch.
desktop.next.rerunStaged: Run another staged review to confirm blockers are resolved.
desktop.next.exportShare: Copy Markdown/JSON/SARIF and attach it to your PR or team handoff.
desktop.next.humanReview: Escalate contested findings to a human reviewer.
desktop.next.captureDecision: Record the final merge decision in your normal team workflow.
desktop.next.prepareMerge: Proceed with your normal merge checklist.
desktop.next.exportRecord: Export the session result to keep a review evidence record.
desktop.next.monitorNextRun: Monitor the next run after new changes to keep evidence fresh.
desktop.next.privatePreviewNote: Desktop guidance is private-preview only and follows existing CodeAgora CLI/session semantics.
